name: Disk Cleanup
description: Scans your drives for temporary files, old logs, and browser caches, then removes them safely to free up disk space.
author: AgentOS Team
preview_steps: Scan %TEMP% and system temp directories
Identify files older than 7 days
Remove selected temp files and empty recycle bin

name: Git Daily Report
description: Summarizes all git commits made today across your repositories and generates a concise markdown report with diffs and stats.
author: DevOps Guild
preview_steps: Find all git repositories under home directory
Collect commits from the last 24 hours
Generate markdown summary with stats

name: Screenshot OCR
description: Captures the current screen, runs optical character recognition, and copies all extracted text to the clipboard ready to paste.
author: Vision Labs
preview_steps: Capture full screen or selected region
Send image to OCR engine
Copy extracted text to clipboard

name: NPM Audit & Fix
description: Runs npm audit on all Node.js projects in the current workspace, then applies safe fixes automatically and reports remaining issues.
author: Node Tooling Co
preview_steps: Locate package.json files recursively
Run npm audit --json on each project
Apply npm audit fix --only=prod for safe fixes

name: Daily Standup Writer
description: Reads your git log, calendar events, and task history to automatically draft your daily standup message for Slack or Teams.
author: Meeting Minimizer
preview_steps: Pull git commits from the last 24 hours
Read open tasks from task database
Draft standup message in configured format

name: Docker Prune Automation
description: Cleans up stopped containers, dangling images, unused volumes, and build cache to reclaim Docker disk space safely.
author: ContainerOps
preview_steps: List stopped containers and dangling images
Show estimated disk space to be freed
Run docker system prune with safe flags

name: Web Research Assistant
description: Given a topic, searches the web for top sources, reads each page, and produces a structured research summary with citations.
author: Research Bots Inc
preview_steps: Search DuckDuckGo for the given topic
Fetch and parse top 5 result pages
Synthesize findings into a structured report

name: Environment Backup
description: Exports all environment variables, installed apps, VS Code extensions, and dotfiles to a timestamped backup archive.
author: SysAdmin Pro
preview_steps: Export environment variables to .env.backup
List installed apps via winget or brew
Archive dotfiles and VS Code settings

name: Log Analyzer
description: Scans application and system log files for errors, warnings, and anomalies, then produces a ranked summary of issues found.
author: Ops Intelligence
preview_steps: Locate log files in common directories
Parse ERROR and WARN level entries
Rank and summarize top issues by frequency

name: Code Review Prep
description: Before submitting a PR, this playbook checks lint, runs tests, summarizes changed files, and drafts a PR description for you.
author: PR Quality Guild
preview_steps: Run linter and formatter on changed files
Execute test suite and report failures
Generate PR description from git diff summary
